Description: Y-axis configuration with optional anchor, scale, and bounds. The anchor controls which side of the chart the axis renders on.

Position of the Y-axis relative to the chart orientation: start places it on the leading side (left in vertical charts), end on the trailing side (right in vertical charts). Possible values: `"start"`, `"end"`.
Show grid lines for this axis.
Orientation of the tagcloud. Possible values: `"horizontal"`, `"vertical"`, `"angled"`.
Y-axis scale type for data transformation. Possible values: `"linear"`, `"log"`, `"sqrt"`.
Show tick marks on the axis.

X-axis scale type. Use 'temporal' for timestamp/date fields (e.g., @timestamp, DATE_TRUNC results). Use 'ordinal' for categorical/text fields. Use 'linear' for numeric fields. Possible values: `"ordinal"`, `"temporal"`, `"linear"`.
